purpose: Secret-free index of narrow live/local evidence that can be rendered without upgrading unverified protocol claims.

allowed_claims: Radicle local CLI verified for one disposable private temporary-RAD_HOME init/inspect replay
Nostr selected-relay acceptance/readback verified for one exact prototype event on two relays
Radicle disposable public seed/remote-clone smoke verified for exact RID rad:z2WtozFrCRhygh9CGzyUN57CN7Nwa
GitHub Actions generated keyless hosted artifact attestations for six prototype artifacts on main
Helia local UnixFS/IPFS add-get verified for the local release artifact fixture bytes
forbidden_claims: Radicle durable public seed/network availability verified
Nostr durability or global propagation verified
full NIP-34 or forge compatibility verified

evidence.verification_summary: Temporary RAD_HOME plus disposable Git repository completed rad auth, private no-seed rad init, and local rad inspect commands.
evidence.notes: Promotes only the disposable private local replay path. Later Loop 34 evidence separately records one bounded disposable public seed/clone smoke; this row does not imply public-network availability.

evidence.verification_summary: Exact prototype/research kind 30617 event was published to and read back from selected relays; local and readback nak verify returned exit code 0.
non_claims: not full NIP-34 or forge protocol compatibility
evidence.notes: Uses only the disposable project key; secret key material remains outside the repo and is not recorded here.

evidence.verification_summary: One disposable public Radicle repository was initialized, seeded from a temporary localhost node, synced/announced, cloned through a separate temporary node, and read back successfully.
non_claims: not proof of broad Radicle network availability
evidence.notes: Uses only disposable temporary state recorded in Loop 34 evidence. No production/private personal keys, paid infrastructure, direct outreach, persistent seed operation, or broad network availability claim.

evidence.verification_summary: GitHub Actions run 28339280081 generated a keyless hosted attestation with SLSA provenance predicate for six prototype artifacts after CI passed on main.
non_claims: not proof of production supply-chain security
not a registry fixture provenance import
not proof of consumer policy verification
evidence.notes: Uses GitHub OIDC/keyless attestation; no production/private personal signing key is recorded or used.

evidence.verification_summary: A project-scoped, non-started in-process Helia instance added fixtures/local-release-artifact.txt to local UnixFS/IPFS storage and read back the exact bytes for CID bafkreibzglri2w3atm6k4jjbrsral2qsntj46ncgfdoeys436ckmkbtiua.
non_claims: not proof of public gateway availability
evidence.notes: Uses only project-scoped npm dev dependencies and local fixture bytes. No paid storage, wallet, public gateway query, persistent daemon, or production/private personal key was used.
